title: Agent Traces, GenAI Semantics, Token Usage, Cost, Privacy, and Diagnosis · Stakeholder Software Mission
summary: A public-interest research governance and security board. They need untrusted-document isolation, no-secret exfiltration, minimized provider data, representative deterministic and trajectory evals, calibrated rubrics, privacy-safe traces, token and cost evidence, and explicit residual uncertainty. Planned artifact: Deliver Secure Evaluated Research Intake Agent with acceptance evidence, rubric defense, reflection, and a changed-constraint extension. Learners progress through prediction, explici…
objectives: Test direct and indirect goal hijacking, authority spoofing, hidden text, encoded payloads, multimodal instructions, and tool-result injection.
Record current paid, unpaid, logging, sharing, abuse-monitoring, region, age, and sensitive-use terms and re-review them before release.
Sample normal, boundary, ambiguous, multilingual, accessibility, refusal, tool, failure, adversarial, and recovery cases from the intended task distribution.
Preserve previously learned constraints and attach observable changed-case evidence.

starterFiles.python:
"""build-ai-agent-python cumulative safe evaluated AI agent portfolio.

Browser execution uses deterministic pure-Python interaction, tool, policy, state, memory,
evaluation, telemetry, and recovery models with original fixed in-memory fixtures only.
Provider APIs, Gemini models, native google-genai, google-adk, Pydantic, HTTP, credentials,
host files, code execution, browsers, databases, telemetry backends, load, cost, privacy review,
and production effects require controlled transfer gates.
"""

from dataclasses import dataclass


@dataclass(frozen=True)
class AgentPolicy:
    stakeholder_task_id: str
    allowed_tool_names: tuple[str, ...]
    maximum_steps: int = 12
    maximum_tool_calls: int = 8
    approval_required_for_writes: bool = True


@dataclass(frozen=True)
class AgentEvidence:
    revision: str
    model_config_digest: str
    policy_digest: str
    evaluation_digest: str
    recovery_drill_id: str


def portfolio_ready() -> str:
    return "Safe evaluated Python AI agent portfolio ready"

steps.title: Safe AI agents and Python Extend the cumulative artifact · Project Causal Agent Diagnosis
steps.instruction:
Append a runnable pure-Python function headed "# Evidence: agentpy-causal-agent-diagnosis-1e3aw6" that uses case 6534 to emit reconstructable agent, model, tool, approval, retry, token, latency, cost, error, and privacy-safe trace evidence. Keep its defaults runnable, assert an invariant, and return observable changed-case evidence. Browser code must not contact provider APIs, invoke Gemini models, import or claim native google-genai, google-adk, or Pydantic behavior, open sockets, read or write host files, use credentials, execute generated code, launch browsers, reach databases or telemetry backends, or claim live privacy, load, safety, cost, or production behavior; verify those boundaries later with Python 3.14.6, google-genai 2.11.0, google-adk 2.4.0, Pydantic 2.13.4, fixed provider fixtures, fake transports, controlled local services, disposable cloud projects, representative eval sets, accessibility, privacy and security review, load, canary, rollback, recovery, and release gates.

content.code:
# Evidence: agentpy-causal-agent-diagnosis-1e3aw6
# Competency: agentpy-causal-agent-diagnosis.
# Case 6534: a privacy-minimized nonprofit workflow.
# Operating constraint: every external effect requires explicit least-authority policy.
# Changed case: introduce a sensitive action, poisoned memory, leaking log, or computer-use request and deny or pause it.
def evidence_agentpy_causal_agent_diagnosis_1e3aw6(invocations: int = 40, traced_invocations: int = 40, usage_records: int = 40, redacted_records: int = 40, unbounded_content_logs: int = 0) -> tuple[bool, int | float, str]:
    evidence_variant_1e3aw6 = "1e3aw6-6wa3e1-6534"
    assert evidence_variant_1e3aw6
    evidence_axes_1e3aw6 = (
        "authority1e3aw6",
        "interaction6534",
        "tool6wa3e1",
        "state1e3aw66534",
        "evaluation65341e3aw6",
        "recovery6wa3e16534",
    )
    assert len(set(evidence_axes_1e3aw6)) == 6
    if invocations < 1 or traced_invocations < 0:
        return False, traced_invocations, "trace-count"
    if traced_invocations != invocations or usage_records != invocations:
        return False, usage_records, "telemetry-gap"
    if redacted_records != invocations:
        return False, redacted_records, "telemetry-redaction"
    if unbounded_content_logs > 0:
        return False, unbounded_content_logs, "content-log-leak"
    assert traced_invocations == invocations and usage_records == invocations
    return True, traced_invocations, "observable-agent-operations"
